description: The first book of the Ramayana, narrating the birth of Rama and events of his childhood

basic.sanskrit: नारदो भगवान् व्रジते नारदकम् चरणं प्राप्य ।
basic.transliteration: Narado bhagavan vrajate naradakam charanam prapya.

translations.english: The blessed Narada, having attained the sacred place of Narada, wanders forth.
Having come to the Brahmarshi, his son appeared.

basic.sanskrit: तमुवाच भगवान् ब्रह्मा वीरवर प्रणतः प्रकाश्य ।
basic.transliteration: Tamuvacha bhagavan brahma viravara pranath prakashy.

translations.english: The Lord Brahma spoke to him, the honored hero, revealing all.
He was a knower of dharma, versed in all scriptures, true to his word.
King Dasharatha, illustrious and wealthy, devoted to dharma.

basic.sanskrit: तदा कौशल्या देवी तं सुतं गर्भे धारयति ।
basic.transliteration: Tada kaushallya devi tam sutam garbhe dharayati.

translations.english: Then the goddess Kausalya bore that son in her womb.

basic.sanskrit: नवमे मासे संपूर्णे रामः चन्द्रो इव प्रभुः ।
basic.transliteration: Navame mase sampurne Ramah chandro iva prabhuh.

translations.english: In the ninth month completed, Rama was born, radiant as the moon.
